step.title: Cleaning up temp folders from previous zip deployments and extracting pushed zip file /tmp/zipdeploy/e10307dc-ff5b-4db7-88c8-36fbf3e4dd10.zip (5.36 MB) to /tmp/zipdeploy/extracted
ChmodRecursive Process exited with total time taken in ms: 448
PreDeployment: context.OutputPath /home/site/wwwroot
step.step: <step title="Executing external process" date="2025-07-27T12:45:43.445" type="process" path="bash" arguments="-c "oryx build /tmp/zipdeploy/extracted -o /home/site/wwwroot --platform python --platform-version 3.12 -p virtualenv_name=antenv --log-file /tmp/build-debug.log -i /tmp/8ddcd0b7eb93e98 --compress-destination-dir | tee /tmp/oryx-build.log ; exit $PIPESTATUS ""
